caption: The video captures a live performance in a small, intimate venue filled with an audience seated in rows of chairs. A musician is on stage playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, while another person sits at a podium to the left, possibly providing commentary or hosting the event. The audience appears engaged, attentively watching the performer. The setting includes wooden blinds covering the windows behind the stage, and various pieces of audio equipment are visible, including speakers and a mixing console. The atmosphere suggests a casual yet focused music event, likely part of a series or festival, as indicated by the "ORCA" logo in the corner of the screen.
